g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what Azure Container Registry is and how it fits in this assignment')
sendPrompt('Explain Azure Monitor and how container logs are sent to it')
sendPrompt('Explain Azure Container Instances and how to deploy to it with Bicep')
sendPrompt('How is a public IP assigned to an ACI in a VNet using Bicep?')
sendPrompt('What is an ACR token and how do you create one for least privilege access?')
sendPrompt('Give me an overview of all the Bicep files I need for this assignment')
sendPrompt('How do I access the deployed app from my laptop?')
